sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ الْفُحُوصَاتُ الطِّبِّيَّةُ الدَّوْرِيَّةُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي نِظَامِ الرِّعَايَةِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ الْوِقَائِيَّةِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Periodični medicinski pregledi smatraju se kamenom temeljcem savremenog sistema preventivne zdravstvene zaštite.
sentences.translationEn: Periodic medical examinations are considered the cornerstone of the modern preventive healthcare system.

sentences.arabic: فَالْكَشْفُ الْمُبَكِّرُ عَنِ الْأَمْرَاضِ يَزِيدُ مِنْ فُرَصِ النَّجَاحِ فِي الْعِلَاجِ وَيُقَلِّلُ مِنَ التَّكَالِيفِ الطِّبِّيَّةِ الْبَاهِظَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rano otkrivanje bolesti povećava šanse za uspjeh u liječenju i smanjuje ogromne medicinske troškove.
sentences.translationEn: Early detection of diseases increases the chances of success in treatment and reduces exorbitant medical costs.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَلَّا يَنْتَظِرَ الشَّخْصُ ظُهُورَ الْأَعْرَاضِ لِيَزُورَ الطَّبِيبَ، بَلْ عَلَيْهِ جَدْوَلَةُ زِيَارَاتٍ سَنَوِيَّةٍ لِلِاطْمِئْنَانِ.
sentences.translation: Osoba ne bi trebala čekati pojavu simptoma da bi posjetila ljekara, već treba zakazati godišnje posjete radi provjere.
sentences.translationEn: A person should not wait for symptoms to appear to visit the doctor, but should schedule annual visits for reassurance.

sentences.arabic: تَتَضَمَّنُ هَذِهِ الْفُحُوصَاتُ غَالِبًا تَحَالِيلَ الدَّمِ وَقِيَاسَ ضَغْطِ الدَّمِ وَمُرَاقَبَةَ وَظَائِفِ الْأَعْضَاءِ الْحَيَوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi pregledi često uključuju analizu krvi, mjerenje krvnog pritiska i praćenje funkcija vitalnih organa.
sentences.translationEn: These examinations often include blood tests, blood pressure measurement, and monitoring the functions of vital organs.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، تَبْقَى الْوِقَايَةُ خَيْرًا مِنَ الْعِلَاجِ، وَالِاهْتِمَامُ بِالتَّفَاصِيلِ الصَّغِيرَةِ يَحْمِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلَ الصِّحِّيَّ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, prevencija ostaje bolja od liječenja, a obraćanje pažnje na male detalje štiti zdravstvenu budućnost.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, prevention remains better than cure, and paying attention to small details protects the future of health.
